item.title: Cloaking.house — A service for cloaking and filtering traffic. The best tool for an affiliate marketer.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Cole
item.description:
What is Cloaking.house? Nowadays, advertising platforms have tightened rules for acceptable ads, and it can be difficult to pass moderation without a good cloaking solution, especially for new affiliate marketers. Cloaking.house is the best solution not only for beginners but also for professionals, and it doesn’t require any programming knowledge. Cloaking.house is a service that […]

The post Cloaking.house — A service for cloaking and filtering traffic. The best tool for an affiliate marketer. appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
What is Cloaking.house?

Nowadays, advertising platforms have tightened rules for acceptable ads, and it can be difficult to pass moderation without a good cloaking solution, especially for new affiliate marketers. Cloaking.house is the best solution not only for beginners but also for professionals, and it doesn’t require any programming knowledge.

Cloaking.house is a service that protects your ads from bots, moderation, competitors, and other non-targeted traffic. This cloaking works by redirecting targeted traffic to your main ad (the offer page) and non-targeted traffic to a safe page (the white page). It works on platforms like Facebook, Google, TikTok, and more.

Running traffic on platforms like TikTok in particular comes with its own IP and account risks — pairing cloaking with clean residential proxies for TikTok gives you an additional layer of protection against bans and detection.

Why do webmasters need cloaking?

Cloaking.house has a rich feature set, and for an affiliate marketer we offer the following:

  • Bypassing blocks for niches restricted by advertising platforms
  • Multifunctional filtering of non-targeted traffic
  • Click tracking and convenient analysis of ad performance
  • Whitelists and blacklists for managing desirable and undesirable IP addresses
  • AI generator for white pages

AI White Page Generator

This is one of the new features of the service. Thanks to AI, you can get a ready-made white page in just a few clicks.

The available customization allows you to create the perfect white page for almost any vertical and in any language. Three AI models are also available:

  • Cloaking AI One Page – Creates a page with a unique design, structure, and content for successful moderation on advertising platforms.
  • Cloaking AI For Apps – Mimics an official app website or landing page, adapted to the chosen platform, niche, and language.
  • Cloaking AI For Ads – Pages have a structure similar to WordPress templates, making them as close as possible to real blogs.

Let’s go through a flow setup example.

Before setting up, it’s important to mention that this cloaking service offers 2 types of integration:

  • PHP Integration – You use a white page hosted on your own server with your own domain. You’ll need to download the site file and upload it to your hosting where the white page is located. Before doing so, rename your white page’s index.php or index.html to site.php or site.html to avoid conflicts during integration.
  • Cloaked Link Method – You use any white page URL with your domain. No hosting is required. Simply park your domain (or one purchased through the service) in the “Domains” section and select an appropriate white page URL.

We’ll go through both options:

Go to the “Flows” tab and click “Create Flow.”

Step 1 – Links

  • In the “Flow Name” field, enter any name you like for the flow.
  • In the “White Page” field, insert the URL of the white page (cloaked link).
    For PHP integration, insert the name of the file you renamed, e.g., site.php.
    For all methods, select load.
  • In the “Offer Page” field, insert the link to your offer and select redirect.

Step 2 – Filtering

Many filters available (you can read about all of them in the FAQ section). The first six are the main ones. If you’re a beginner, it’s best to leave them all enabled.
The rest are self-explanatory.

Step 3 – Status

Here you select the flow status:

  • Pause – The flow is paused, meaning any click on the link will be redirected to the white page.
  • Active – The flow is active, meaning the cloaking is working and filtering traffic. Targeted traffic will now be redirected to the offer page according to your filters.
  • IP Whitelist – Any IP added here will bypass the filters and go directly to the offer page.

For managing multiple accounts or running traffic across different geos, using rotating residential proxies alongside your cloaking setup helps keep each account’s IP footprint clean and separate. If you’re running social media campaigns at scale, the proxies for social media automation guide covers exactly how to structure that.

Integration

Scroll to the bottom of the flow you just created and click the download button, as shown in the photo.

You will then have access to:

  • PHP Integration
  • Cloaked Link Method (available if you parked your domain and it passed verification; otherwise, only PHP integration will be available).

Follow the instructions for your chosen method and you’re done. If you run into any connectivity issues during setup, the proxy errors troubleshooting guide covers the most common routing and configuration problems with exact fixes. Don’t hesitate to reach out to support either, they’re available at every stage of flow creation.

Pricing Cloaking.house

Cloaking.house offers all available cloaking features at a minimal price. The packages differ in the number of allowed flows and the cost of the AI white page generator. Using the promo code FPRXY20, you’ll get a 20% OFF

Summary

Cloaking.house is very convenient to use, with a simple and user-friendly interface that anyone can handle. Even if you run into issues, support is always ready to help with any questions about Cloaking.house. Considering its price and functionality, it’s the best choice for affiliate marketers.

The post Cloaking.house — A service for cloaking and filtering traffic. The best tool for an affiliate marketer. appeared first on Ziny.io.

item.title: How to Configure ZinyProxy in XLogin Browser: Step-by-Step Guide
item.dc:creator: Daniel Cole
item.description:
What is Ziny Proxy? Ziny Proxy is a premium proxy service designed for scraping and automation. Rotating residential, mobile, and datacenter proxies in 190+ countries, 24 hour sticky sessions with no blacklisted websites and an advanced filtration system to provide only the highest quality IPs to the end user. Key Features: ✓ Global proxy coverage […]

The post How to Configure ZinyProxy in XLogin Browser: Step-by-Step Guide appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
What is Ziny Proxy?

Ziny Proxy is a premium proxy service designed for scraping and automation. Rotating residential, mobile, and datacenter proxies in 190+ countries, 24 hour sticky sessions with no blacklisted websites and an advanced filtration system to provide only the highest quality IPs to the end user.

Key Features:

✓ Global proxy coverage (190+ countries)
✓ Residential, ISP, mobile & datacenter IPs
✓ HTTP(S) & SOCKS5 support
✓ Unlimited bandwidth, Unrestricted IPs
✓ Clean, undetected IP pools
✓ Works with all major bots and anti-detect browsers
✓ Free trial (on request)
✓ API access + Telegram support

Popular uses include:

  • Web scraping & data collection
  • Managing social media accounts (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, FB, etc.)
  • Ad verification & anti-fraud
  • AI & LLM data scraping (training)
  • Affiliate marketing (CPA/CPI)
  • Sneaker/resell bots & flash sales
  • Crypto airdrop farming
  • SERP tracking & SEO
  • Geo-unblocking & streaming access

How to connect Ziny Proxies?

Step 1
Visit the Ziny Proxy website and click on the “Get Started” button.

Step 2
Create an Account by Signing Up if this is your first time on this highly recommended proxy provider, if already a customer you can simply Login on your dashboard.

Step 3
Under the “Purchase Plan” tab you can buy a plan, or if interested in trying a trial you can contact Ziny Telegram Support. Ziny Proxy accepts all cards and 20+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, XMR, USDT, ETH, and more. If interested in an unlimited proxy plan, contact support for pricing and specifications.

Purchase the type of proxies and the amount of usage you are interested in.

Step 4
Select the proxy plan you purchased under the “Products” tab and access the Endpoint/Proxy Generator. Select the specifications you need for your proxy string.

Ready to try it yourself?
Contact Telegram 24/7 Support
Get premium proxies at dev.ziny.io/

XLogin Antidetect Browser is a browser designed to protect against linking multiple accounts. It emulates several real physical devices by creating multiple virtual profiles, modifying browser fingerprints, and allowing users to run an unlimited number of accounts on one device without detection.

XLogin supports global websites and platforms and is applicable to all types of browser-based businesses, such as Google, Facebook, Twitter, Amazon, eBay, Etsy, TikTok, Tinder, PayPal, Stripe, Outlook, Gmail, and other online platforms. It is suitable for account registration, ad verification, store operations, affiliate marketing, automation, and other industries.
A free 3-day trial is available for new users!

Separate and independent browser environments
Protection for multiple browser fingerprints
Easy multi-account management
Convenient browser automation
Efficient team collaboration
Overcome device and geolocation restrictions

Step 1: Create an account and log in to Zinyproxy.
Step 2: Please add your proxy settings guide here.
Step 3: Set Up Your XLogin Browser Profile
⦁ Register and Download to the ⦁ XLogin. (Supprot Free Trial)
(https://xlogin.us/?sub=zinyproxy)

⦁ Launch the XLogin client and Login.

Step4: Click “New browser profile” to create the profile.

  1. Fill in a display name and configure the browser fingerprint settings.
  2. Navigate to the “Setting proxy server” section within the profile.
  3. Enable proxy server.
  4. Paste the IP:Port:Username:Password or enter the Zinyproxy information:
    (1) Choose the correct proxy type (e.g., HTTP, SOCKS5).
    (2) Enter the IP address and port.
    (3) Enter the username and password if required.
    (4) Click “Test Proxy” to ensure the connection works.
    (5) Save the proxy settings, then save the profile.

Step4: Lauch the profile.

The post How to Configure ZinyProxy in XLogin Browser: Step-by-Step Guide appeared first on Ziny.io.

The post Setup Ziny Proxy on GeeLark- 1st Antidetect Phone appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
What is Ziny Proxy?

Ziny Proxy is a premium proxy service designed for scraping and automation.

Rotating residential, Mobile, and Datacenter proxies in 190+ countries, 24 hour sticky sessions with No blacklisted websites and an advanced filtration system  to provide only the heights quality IPs to the end user. 

Key Features:

✓ Global proxy coverage (190+ countries)
✓ Residential, ISP, mobile & datacenter IPs
✓ HTTP(S) & SOCKS5 support
✓ Unlimited bandwidth, Unrestricted IPs
✓ Clean, undetected IP pools
✓ Works with all major bots and anti-detect browsers
✓ Free trial (on request)
✓ API access + Telegram support

Popular uses include:

  • Web scraping & data collection
  • Managing social media accounts (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, FB, etc.)
  • Ad verification & anti-fraud
  • AI & LLM data scraping (training)
  • Affiliate marketing (CPA/CPI)
  • Sneaker/resell bots & flash sales
  • Crypto airdrop farming
  • SERP tracking & SEO
  • Geo-unblocking & streaming access

Buy Proxy at Ziny

Step 1
Visit the Ziny Proxy website and click on the “Get Started”  button.

Step 2
Create an Account by Signing Up if this is your first time on this highly recommended proxy provider, if already a customer you can simply Login on your dashboard

Step 3
Under the “Purchase Plan” Tab you can buy a Plan of if interested in trying a trail you can contact the Ziny Telegram Support
Ziny Proxy accepts all cards and over 20+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, XMR, USDT, ETH and more….
If interested in an Unlimited Proxy Plan contact support for pricing and specifications.

Purchase the type of proxies and the amount of usage you are interested in.

Step 4
Select the Proxy Plan you are purchased under the “Products” tab and access the Endpoint/Proxy Generator and select the specifications you need for your proxy string.



Ready to try it yourself?
Contact Telegram 24/7 Support
Get premium proxies at dev.ziny.io/

Connect Ziny Proxy with GeeLark

What is GeeLark?

GeeLark is the first antidetect phone solution, ideal for managing multiple mobile accounts without restrictions and serving as the perfect alternative to Android emulators.
It is perfect for traffic arbitrage, account farming, social media management, and any situation where you need to run mobile apps across multiple phones. Plus, GeeLark also includes a fully featured anti-detect browser, giving you two powerful tools in a single platform.

– Remotely control multiple Android phones from a PC.
– Each phone has unique parameters, appearing as a different device to apps and websites.
– Automate tasks using the synchronizer and AI-powered automation tools.
– Efficient team collaboration with role assignments and permission control.

1.   Visit the GeeLark, sign up, download and install the software, then sign in within the application:

2.   After signing in, launch GeeLark and create a new browser profile.

3.   Go to Proxy Settings, choose “Custom”, then select SOCKS5 or HTTP(s) to start using your proxies.

4.   Fill in your proxy information, test with “Check Proxy”, then click “OK” to save your profile.

5.   Your profile is now listed in the main interface; simply press “Start” to open your cloud phone.

The post Setup Ziny Proxy on GeeLark- 1st Antidetect Phone appeared first on Ziny.io.

item.title: MuLogin Antidetect Browser: The Privacy Browser Built for Power Users
item.dc:creator: Daniel Cole
item.description:
In the world of multi-account management, e-commerce automation, and affiliate marketing, staying hidden while running multiple accounts is more important than ever. With modern platforms using advanced fingerprinting techniques and anti-bot systems, traditional browsers simply don’t cut it anymore. That’s where MuLogin Antidetect Browser comes in. MuLogin is one of the top anti-detection browsers on […]

The post MuLogin Antidetect Browser: The Privacy Browser Built for Power Users appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
In the world of multi-account management, e-commerce automation, and affiliate marketing, staying hidden while running multiple accounts is more important than ever. With modern platforms using advanced fingerprinting techniques and anti-bot systems, traditional browsers simply don’t cut it anymore.

That’s where MuLogin Antidetect Browser comes in.

MuLogin is one of the top anti-detection browsers on the market today. Designed to help individuals and teams manage multiple online identities, it offers powerful fingerprint customisation, proxy support, and built-in collaboration tools, making it the perfect tool for serious professionals in e-commerce, digital marketing, crypto, and beyond. If you want to understand how MuLogin compares to other antidetect options before committing, the guide to the best anti-detect browsers covers the full landscape side by side.

What Is MuLogin?

MuLogin Antidetect Browser is a privacy-focused, multi-account browser that allows users to create multiple virtual browser environments, each with its own unique browser fingerprint and IP address. These isolated environments prevent websites and platforms from detecting or linking your different accounts even if you’re managing hundreds of them at once.

By simulating independent devices for each account, MuLogin helps users avoid bans, verification prompts, or account association issues. It’s a go-to tool for anyone who needs to scale online operations safely.

Key Features and Benefits

Here’s what makes MuLogin an industry leader in the antidetect browser space:

✓ Multi-Platform, Multi-Account Management

MuLogin allows you to create and manage multiple browser profiles simultaneously, each in its own isolated environment. Whether you’re working on Windows or macOS, it’s designed to handle bulk operations without any risk of fingerprint collisions or account bans.

✓ Unique Browser Fingerprints for Every Profile

Each virtual browser profile you create comes with a unique, customizable fingerprint. You can configure key elements like:

  • User agent
  • Screen resolution
  • Fonts
  • Canvas fingerprint
  • WebRTC & WebGL
  • Timezone and language

This fingerprint isolation ensures websites treat each profile as a completely separate user on a separate device. For a detailed breakdown of how to verify your fingerprint is genuinely clean before going live, the BrowserScan fingerprint detection guide shows you exactly what platforms see when they inspect your browser environment.

✓ Real-Time Fingerprint Protection

MuLogin prevents platforms from tracking your behavior across tabs, browsers, or sessions. You can open and operate multiple profiles at the same time and each will remain undetectable and unlinked.

✓ Simple Browser Automation

Automate tasks like login sequences, form submissions, or data scraping directly from the MuLogin browser using built-in tools or third-party integrations. This is ideal for e-commerce, affiliate testing, or repetitive tasks.

✓ Multi-User Collaboration

MuLogin is designed for teams. It supports role-based access and collaborative use, allowing multiple users to share and manage browser profiles without security risks or manual logins. This is especially useful for agencies, remote teams, and VAs handling client work or marketing campaigns.

✓ Proxy Provider Integration

MuLogin seamlessly integrates with premium proxy services, including Ziny Proxy. Assign a dedicated IP to each browser profile to simulate real user locations, bypass geo-blocks, and add a second layer of identity protection.

Who Should Use MuLogin?

If you’re involved in any of the following activities, MuLogin will give you a competitive edge:

For social media managers running accounts across TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook specifically, the proxies for social media automation guide covers how to structure your IP setup across platforms to avoid cross-account detection. For affiliate marketers, the Cloaking.house affiliate proxy guide pairs directly with this setup for managing traffic and ad moderation.

MuLogin + Ziny Proxy = Full Privacy Control

Using MuLogin with Ziny Proxy creates the ideal privacy stack for any business that relies on stealth and scale.

  • MuLogin handles browser identity and fingerprinting.
  • Ziny Proxy assigns clean, rotating or static IPs to each account.

Together, they help you bypass bans, avoid platform restrictions, and operate at full capacity with peace of mind.

How to connect Ziny Proxies with Mulogin Browser?

Step 1

Login on your Ziny Dashboard

Step 2

Under the “Purchase Plan” Tab you can buy a Plan of if interested in trying a trail you can contact the Ziny Telegram Support
Ziny Accepts all cards and over 20+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, XMR, USDT, ETH and more….
If interested in an Unlimited Proxy Plan contact support for pricing and specifications.

Step 3

Select the Proxy Plan you are interested in and access the Endpoint/Proxy Generator and select the specifications you need

Step 4

Download and access on your Mulogin Account (Support 3-day Free Trial)

Step 5

Navigate under the “Browser List” tab and Add a Browser

Step 6

Enter your Proxy details under “Basic Configuration” and check the network to make sure the proxy has been connected successfully, lastly click “Save”

Then you can open the browser you connected your Ziny Proxies with and crawl the web anonymously.

Final Thoughts

As platforms become more aggressive with tracking, browser fingerprinting, and AI-powered detection, antidetect tools like MuLogin are no longer optional, they’re essential. Whether you’re a solo marketer or managing a team of VA’s and client accounts, MuLogin offers you the protection and scalability you need to stay ahead of the game.

Pair MuLogin Antidetect Browser with Ziny Proxy today for unbeatable multi-account privacy and performance.

The post MuLogin Antidetect Browser: The Privacy Browser Built for Power Users appeared first on Ziny.io.

item.title: Best Anti-detect Browser of 2026? BitBrowser for Multi-Accounting Review
item.dc:creator: Daniel Cole
item.description:
What does BitBrowser do? BitBrowser mainly realizes: multiple browser windows, multiple accounts (FB/TK/X/WS..), to prevent the occurrence of associated accounts between windows. Each window simulates independent computer information and proxy IP addresses to make the environments independent and isolated from each other, thereby improving account security! Deeply developed using Google and Firefox kernels, it achieves […]

The post Best Anti-detect Browser of 2026? BitBrowser for Multi-Accounting Review appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
What does BitBrowser do?

BitBrowser mainly realizes: multiple browser windows, multiple accounts (FB/TK/X/WS..), to prevent the occurrence of associated accounts between windows. Each window simulates independent computer information and proxy IP addresses to make the environments independent and isolated from each other, thereby improving account security! Deeply developed using Google and Firefox kernels, it achieves a safe and pure environment effect at the physical level. There is 100% no correlation between browser windows. With the multi-employee collaborative management function, it improves your account security and operational efficiency!

What is the difference between BitBrowser and ordinary browsers?

BitBrowser can log in to multiple accounts to prevent association. When you open BitBrowser, you can open multiple accounts on the same platform in the browser window to reduce the risk of unrelated accounts.

This makes it genuinely safe to run multiple accounts on the same platform simultaneously without any risk of association. To verify your fingerprint isolation is working correctly before going live, the BrowserScan fingerprint detection guide shows you exactly what each window looks like to platform detection systems.

Which businesses are suitable for BitBrowser?

Cross-border e-commerce: Open multiple store windows and manage multiple store accounts on Amazon, eBay, Etsy, and Shopee simultaneously without triggering platform association checks. For e-commerce specifically, Ziny’s e-commerce proxies are optimised for sustained multi-account sessions on major retail platforms.

Social media account management: Build and maintain social media account matrices across Facebook, TikTok, Twitter, and more. Each account gets its own fingerprint and IP, making them appear as completely independent users. The proxies for social media automation guide covers how to structure your IP pool across platforms to avoid cross-account detection.

Web3 and blockchain: Prevent multiple wallet logins from being associated, protect local privacy, and manage blockchain activity across isolated environments.

Advertising and SEO: Protect local information, manage multiple ad accounts, and run geo-specific campaigns without fingerprint leakage. Ziny’s SEO proxies integrate directly with BitBrowser for SERP tracking and competitor monitoring across different regions.

Research and data collection: Isolate research activity across separate environments, protecting your real identity and preventing session contamination between projects.

BitBrowser also integrates cloud phone functionality:

Matching a vast array of real phone parameters, one device allows you to easily manage multiple cloud phones!
Simple configuration: Simply configure a proxy to easily access major global apps. Supports one-click new devices for efficient mobile environment rotation!

1. Simple and Fast Phone Profiles Configuration

Automatically match real phone parameters to efficiently complete overseas environment configuration! Configure a proxy IP for your environment with a single click, creating a fast, stable, and secure network environment. Native support for Google Play ensures seamless access to international apps and services.

2. Simulating a Vast Array of Parameters, Authenticating Environments

Simulating a vast array of parameters, using real phone chipsets, provides a more realistic overseas phone environment. Automatically matches core settings such as language, time zone, location, carrier, and SIM information based on IP addresses. Supporting over 600 global carriers, automatically simulates SIM information, and emulates various phone sensor parameters.

3. Easily Set Sub-Account Permissions for Convenient Account Asset Management

Flexibly assign permissions to team sub-accounts and dynamically adjust the number of mobile environments a sub-account can use for efficient account asset management.
Flexibly adjust the number of mobile environments to maximize operational costs. Sub-accounts operate independently, maximizing the use of idle resources and improving environment utilization. Easily acquire a large number of overseas customers and implement matrix marketing!

How to use BitBrowser?

The method of using BitBrowser, Bit Fingerprint Browser supports 10 profiles for free (10 profiles are set up and opened), and it is necessary to carry static/dynamic proxy IP to the window to set it, and the local environment starts global mode. Only after the fingerprint is generated can it operate normally. If the proxy is not set, the local proxy is used. If 10 browser are not enough, you need to purchase a membership package.

What are the functions of BitBrowser?

For details, please see the official website link: https://www.bitbrowser.net/
One-click synchronization: control multiple windows at the same time.
Proxy settings: support global proxy environment construction. Static/dynamic.
Google/Firefox kernel: supports deep kernel development. You can switch to use the kernel in the browser.
RPA automation: you can set up automation programs for the creation port, and automatically perform simple and brainless work.
API interface: Local API :The software comes with local services, which supports users to operate the software window and run automation scripts through the Local API interface call.
Script market: provides the ecology of the script market and provides a publishing section for more users and developers.

Batch operation function

Window batch import/export: batch creation and upload, download the template and fill it out and upload it directly.
Cookies batch import and export: support selecting multiple windows to batch download or export cookies.
Batch proxy setting: batch proxy/window fingerprint setting.
Batch remote operation: support sub-account setting. Employee allocation and collaborative operation.

Summary:

BitBrowser can be used in various cross-border business scenarios. Using BitBrowser, you can log in to more accounts without any association with each other. Multi-account management is inseparable from the powerful anti-detection function of BitBrowser. It is permanently free for use in 10 profiles, safe and efficient multi-account management, employee allocation, and suitable for proxy IP use anywhere in the world.

The post Best Anti-detect Browser of 2026? BitBrowser for Multi-Accounting Review appeared first on Ziny.io.

item.title: How to Use the VMLogin Privacy Browser? Full Guide
item.dc:creator: Daniel Cole
item.description:
VMLogin Privacy Browser is a powerful tool for managing multiple online accounts securely and anonymously. VMLogin helps you stay undetected by creating unique browser fingerprints for each profile. In this guide, you’ll learn step-by-step how to set up and start using VMLogin. Step 1: Launch the VMLogin and log in to your account（Support 3-day Free […]

The post How to Use the VMLogin Privacy Browser? Full Guide appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
VMLogin Privacy Browser is a powerful tool for managing multiple online accounts securely and anonymously. VMLogin helps you stay undetected by creating unique browser fingerprints for each profile. In this guide, you’ll learn step-by-step how to set up and start using VMLogin.

Step 1: Launch the VMLogin and log in to your account（Support 3-day Free Trial）

Step 2: Create a New Browser Profile and Set the Proxy IP.

Step 3: Paste Proxy in VMLogin and Test

First, toggle Enable the proxy server to ON.
Then, click “Paste proxy info” – VMLogin will automatically fill in the IP, port, username, and password.
In the Test IP URL field, enter ip-api.com.
Click Test Proxy to verify the connection.

If the proxy is set up correctly, you’ll see a success message with the new IP and location. Click “Confirm” and then “Save” to store the settings.

Step 4: Save the Profile

After saving your proxy settings, return to the Basic Configuration panel.
Give your browser profile a name, review the remaining browser and fingerprint protection settings, and then scroll down to click “Save profile” at the bottom.

Your new profile with proxy integration is now ready.

Step 5: Launch the Profile

Now go to Browser Profile in the left menu. Locate the profile you just created, right-click on it, and select “Launch browser” from the menu.

This will launch a new browser instance using the custom fingerprint and proxy you’ve set.

Best Proxy Provider To Use in 2025

What is Ziny Proxy?

Ziny Proxy is a premium proxy service designed for scraping and automation.
Rotating residential, Mobile, and Datacenter proxies in 190+ countries, 24 hour sticky sessions with No blacklisted websites and an advanced filtration system to provide only the heights quality IPs to the end user.

Key Features:

  • Global proxy coverage (190+ countries)
  • Residential, ISP, mobile & datacenter IPs
  • HTTP(S) & SOCKS5 support
  • Unlimited bandwidth, Unrestricted IPs
  • Clean, undetected IP pools
  • Works with all major bots and anti-detect browsers
  • Free trial (on request)
  • API access + 24/7 Telegram support

Place a Work Order and a developer will be available to create any automation process you need.

What’s Ziny Proxy Used For?

Ziny Proxy is used for ALL use cases
white-hat to “dark” grey-ish automation.
Popular uses include:

  • Web scraping & data collection
  • Managing social media accounts (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, FB, etc.)
  • Ad verification & anti-fraud
  • AI & LLM data scraping (training)
  • Affiliate marketing (CPA/CPI)
  • Crypto airdrop farming
  • SERP tracking & SEO
  • Geo-unblocking & streaming access

How to connect Ziny Proxies?

Step 1

Visit Ziny Proxy website and click on the Login/SignUp button.

Step 2

Create an Account by Signing Up if this is your first time on this highly recommended proxy provider, if already a customer you can simply Login on your dashboard.

Step 3

Under the “Purchase Plan” Tab you can buy a Plan of if interested in trying a trail you can contact the Ziny Telegram Support
Ziny Proxy accepts all cards and over 20+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, XMR, USDT, ETH and more….
If interested in an Unlimited Proxy Plan contact support for pricing and specifications.

Step 4

Select the Proxy Plan you are interested in and access the Endpoint/Proxy Generator and select the specifications you need.

Your automation journey couldn’t start any better than this.

The post How to Use the VMLogin Privacy Browser? Full Guide appeared first on Ziny.io.

item.title: How to Use VMcard Virtual Credit Cards for Ads Payments | Guide
item.dc:creator: Daniel Cole
item.description:
Virtual Credit Cards for Global Payments: How to Use Vmcard with Ziny Proxy Virtual credit cards are powerful tools for overseas advertising, cross-border subscriptions, and global payment scenarios. Vmcard offers convenient, secure, and real-time Visa/Mastercard virtual card services. It supports 24/7 top-up and online payments without the need for a physical card. In this guide, […]

The post How to Use VMcard Virtual Credit Cards for Ads Payments | Guide appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
Virtual Credit Cards for Global Payments: How to Use Vmcard with Ziny Proxy

Virtual credit cards are powerful tools for overseas advertising, cross-border subscriptions, and global payment scenarios. Vmcard offers convenient, secure, and real-time Visa/Mastercard virtual card services. It supports 24/7 top-up and online payments without the need for a physical card.

In this guide, we’ll walk you through using Vmcard from account registration and fund top-up to card creation and payment—so you can get started quickly and eliminate payment barriers.

Step 1: Register a Vmcard Account

Web Registration:

  • Visit vmcardio.com
  • Click “Sign Up” and fill in your email and password to complete email verification.
  • Log in to the dashboard to begin managing your account.

Step 2: Add Funds to Your Account

Vmcard supports various stable top-up methods that are fast, secure, and reliable.

  • Log in to the Vmcard dashboard
  • Click the “Top Up” button to generate your unique top-up address
  • Use a common payment tool or wallet to complete the transfer
  • Once successful, the funds will automatically be added to your account balance, available for card creation and reloading

Step 3: Create a Card

Depending on your use case (ad campaigns, e-commerce registration, subscription services, etc.), select the appropriate card type.

  • Click “Create New Card”
  • Set the card name, spending limit, and usage label
  • Pay the issuance fee
  • Once issued, you can view the card number, expiration date, CVV, and other details
  • Supports multi-BIN options and batch creation to meet team or agent needs

Step 4: Use the Card

Vmcard cards can be used in the following scenarios:

  • Advertising platforms: Meta / TikTok / Google
  • Tool subscriptions: OpenAI / Midjourney / Notion AI
  • E-commerce platforms: Shopify / Stripe / Amazon
  • Communication services: Starlink / Cloud services / Domain registration

Tip: Each card supports individual top-up and limit settings, allowing budget control and risk management.

Step 5: Card Management & Risk Control

In the dashboard, you can manage each card as follows:

  • Top up / freeze / unfreeze / deactivate in real-time
  • Set transaction, daily, and monthly limits
  • Download billing statements and track transactions
  • Use tags and notes for better organization
  • Supports sub-account permissions for enterprise-level management

Vmcard is your best choice to access the global payment network. It supports multi-currency payments, real-time top-ups, and flexible card control—helping you overcome payment challenges with ease.

Register now at vmcardio.com and start your global payment journey!

Best Proxy Provider For AD Accounts in 2025

What is Ziny Proxy?

Ziny Proxy is a premium proxy service designed for scraping and automation.

Rotating residential, Mobile, and Datacenter proxies in 190+ countries, 24 hour sticky sessions with No blacklisted websites and an advanced filtration system to provide only the heights quality IPs to the end user.

Key Features:

  • Global proxy coverage (190+ countries)
  • Residential, ISP, mobile & datacenter IPs
  • HTTP(S) & SOCKS5 support
  • Unlimited bandwidth, Unrestricted IPs
  • Clean, undetected IP pools
  • Works with all major bots and anti-detect browsers
  • Free trial (on request)
  • API access + Telegram support

What’s Ziny Proxy Used For?

Ziny Proxy is used for ALL use cases, including ad verification and ad payment credit cards

Popular uses include:

  • Web scraping & data collection
  • Managing social media accounts (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, FB, etc.)
  • Ad verification, anti-fraud & virtual credit cards
  • AI & LLM data scraping (training)
  • Affiliate marketing (CPA/CPI)
  • Sneaker/resell bots & flash sales
  • Crypto airdrop farming
  • SERP tracking & SEO
  • Geo-unblocking & streaming access

How to Connect Ziny Proxies?

Step 1

Visit Ziny Proxy website and click on the Login/SignUp button.

Step 2

Create an Account by Signing Up if this is your first time on this highly recommended proxy provider, if already a customer you can simply Login on your dashboard.

Step 3

Under the “Purchase Plan” Tab you can buy a Plan of if interested in trying a trial you can contact the Ziny Telegram Support
Ziny Proxy accepts all cards and over 20+ cryptocurrencies including BTC, XMR, USDT, ETH and more….
If interested in an Unlimited Proxy Plan contact support for pricing and specifications.


Step 4

Select the Proxy Plan you are interested in and access the Endpoint/Proxy Generator and select the specifications you need.


Final Step:

You can connect to Ziny Proxies through the Windows Proxy settings, Proxy extensions like FoxyProxy or Proxy SwitchyOmega.
Ziny also works with all anti-detect/privacy browsers or cloud phone software.

Ready to try it yourself?

Contact Telegram 24/7 Support

The post How to Use VMcard Virtual Credit Cards for Ads Payments | Guide appeared first on Ziny.io.

item.title: How to Register Multiple Facebook Accounts on One Device
item.dc:creator: Daniel Cole
item.description:
How to Register Multiple Facebook Accounts on One Device Facebook and TikTok are essential applications for cross-border users, whether for work or personal life, and having multiple accounts has become a common requirement. Creating a secondary account is the most frequently encountered situation. However, generally, overseas applications only allow each user to create one account. […]

The post How to Register Multiple Facebook Accounts on One Device appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
How to Register Multiple Facebook Accounts on One Device

Facebook and TikTok are essential applications for cross-border users, whether for work or personal life, and having multiple accounts has become a common requirement. Creating a secondary account is the most frequently encountered situation.

However, generally, overseas applications only allow each user to create one account. If a user is detected to have multiple linked accounts, they may be blocked and unable to log into their previous account.

So, if you want to securely register multiple social media accounts on one device, how should you do it? The method is relatively straightforward. Today, let’s take Facebook accounts as an example and discuss how to register multiple Facebook accounts on a single device.

Advantages of Having Multiple Facebook Accounts

During the development of cross-border marketing, Facebook accounts can not only be used for business promotion but also for creating personal pages, sharing products and services, interacting with customers, and even for advertising releases, precisely showcasing brand advertisements to your target audience.

Having multiple Facebook accounts can help cross-border users to:

  • Operate accounts in different markets, reaching a broader audience.
  • Conduct A/B testing for advertising content, quickly assessing the effectiveness of ads.
  • Enhance visibility by using a main account alongside other accounts for mutual promotion.

For social media professionals managing accounts across multiple platforms simultaneously, the proxies for social media automation guide covers how to structure your IP setup across Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit to keep every account genuinely isolated.

How to Register Multiple Facebook Accounts

Option 1: Multiple Physical Devices

The most straightforward approach — one device per account, each connected to a separate overseas network. Effective but expensive to scale and cumbersome to manage across many accounts.

Option 2: Purchase Existing Accounts

Buying Facebook accounts is quicker but the quality is hard to control. Low-quality purchased accounts often suffer reduced content visibility, making them less suitable for serious cross-border marketing.

Option 3: Cloud Phone + Proxy IP (Recommended)

The most scalable and cost-effective approach. Tools like DuoPlus cloud phone create multiple independent mobile environments on a single device, each appearing as a completely separate real device to Facebook’s systems. Paired with the right proxy IP, each environment is genuinely isolated.

The key pairing here is residential proxies — ISP-assigned IPs that match the mobile environment each cloud phone simulates. Facebook’s detection systems see real home network traffic, not datacenter or shared proxy ranges. For TikTok account management specifically, which has some of the strictest detection in 2026, the TikTok proxies for multi-account management guide covers the exact setup.

Using DuoPlus Cloud Phone to Register Multiple Facebook Accounts Correctly

1. Prepare Email and Personal Information

  • Ensure different email addresses and phone numbers for each account. It is recommended to use Gmail for email, and the phone number should be used for verification, allowing you to receive verification codes.
  • Think about how to set up personal information for each account, including name, date of birth, occupation, profile picture, etc., avoiding the use of identical information.

2. Open the DuoPlus Cloud Phone Official Website

Select the number of cloud phones and the duration you need.

3. Find a Reliable Proxy IP (SOCKS5)

Fill in the proxy information on the DuoPlus interface. Tip: Different cloud phones work best with different proxy IPs, which is key to account security.

4. Start the Cloud Phone Device

Download Facebook on the cloud phone and begin the account registration process (you can also pre-install Facebook on the cloud phone to save time).



Users only need to log into the Facebook account on the DuoPlus cloud phone regularly, without frequently switching proxy information and cloud devices, to steadily develop cross-border business.

Why Use Cloud Phones to Register Facebook Accounts?

For cross-border partners, directly renting cloud servers or using proxy browsers can also achieve the goal of registering multiple Facebook accounts, but it is not necessary to use cloud phones.

Of course, you can use different methods to achieve batch registration of Facebook accounts.

  • Renting Windows servers to remotely control the computer terminal can achieve normal account registration, but remote operations may lag, making the user experience less than ideal.
  • Using proxy browsers, you can open multiple browser environments on the local device, each with a separate IP environment, and then register Facebook accounts again. Proxy browsers can also set group management permissions, which is a more common method, but the browser environment is primarily web-based.

Using cross-border cloud phones to register overseas social media accounts has two main advantages:

  • DuoPlus cloud phone is based on ARM architecture, with a stable version of Android, and is designed to be compatible with mobile applications, ensuring that the device settings align with the requirements of overseas social media applications for real Facebook users.
  • Cloud phone management is more convenient, allowing mobile/computer/tablet devices to be used at any time to check overseas social media accounts, and the data from cross-border cloud phones is also stored in the cloud, which can reduce the local device’s privacy risks.

The environment of overseas social media platforms is constantly changing, and using suitable tools to manage multiple accounts is a crucial step for cross-border users to seize market opportunities. Choose DuoPlus cloud phone to create your multiple Facebook accounts, fundamentally enhancing account security and user experience!

Get Started: Click here to register and receive a one-month cloud mobile service

Join the Community:
Telegram Account: https://t.me/DuoPlus6
Telegram Channel: https://t.me/duoplusen

The post How to Register Multiple Facebook Accounts on One Device appeared first on Ziny.io.

item.title: Why OmniLogin Is One of the Best Anti-Detect Privacy Browsers in 2026
item.dc:creator: Daniel Cole
item.description:
Why OmniLogin Is One of the Best Anti-Detect Privacy Browsers in 2026 In the rapidly evolving digital world of 2026, online anonymity, privacy, and operational security have become more than just preferences, they’re necessities. Whether you’re an affiliate marketer, e-commerce entrepreneur, data analyst, cryptocurrency investor, or part of a marketing agency, maintaining multiple online identities […]

The post Why OmniLogin Is One of the Best Anti-Detect Privacy Browsers in 2026 appeared first on Ziny.io.
item.content:encoded:
Why OmniLogin Is One of the Best Anti-Detect Privacy Browsers in 2026

In the rapidly evolving digital world of 2026, online anonymity, privacy, and operational security have become more than just preferences, they’re necessities. Whether you’re an affiliate marketer, e-commerce entrepreneur, data analyst, cryptocurrency investor, or part of a marketing agency, maintaining multiple online identities and avoiding detection is crucial. But simply using a privacy-focused browser isn’t enough anymore.

That’s where OmniLogin comes in. OmniLogin is a next-generation anti-detect browser built from the ground up to prevent advanced tracking methods. While traditional browsers like Firefox, Chrome, and Brave offer basic privacy protections such as cookie blocking and ad filtering, they can’t hide your unique browser fingerprint—an increasingly common technique platforms use to track and identify you.

This comprehensive guide explores why OmniLogin is emerging as the go-to privacy browser in 2026. We’ll examine its unique features, how it compares with competitors, its use cases, automation capabilities, and integration with proxies like Ziny Proxy to create a bulletproof online environment.

For a full comparison of how OmniLogin stacks up against other leading options, the guide to the best anti-detect browsers in 2026 covers the complete market side by side.

The Browser Fingerprinting Threat: Why Traditional Privacy Tools Fail

Browser fingerprinting is the process of collecting information about a user’s browser and system configuration to identify them uniquely. Unlike cookies that can be cleared or blocked, fingerprints are passive and almost impossible to prevent without specialized tools.

Some of the data points used for fingerprinting include:

  • Canvas fingerprinting (HTML5 graphics rendering)
  • WebGL (Graphics API capabilities)
  • AudioContext
  • Installed fonts and plugins
  • Screen resolution, color depth, and aspect ratio
  • Timezone, language settings, system locale
  • Operating system and browser version
  • Touchscreen and input devices
  • WebRTC and IP leaks

This data is cross-referenced and compiled into a digital fingerprint that persists across sessions even when switching IPs or clearing cookies. This makes traditional privacy tools largely ineffective.

OmniLogin directly addresses this problem by creating isolated browser environments that each have a spoofed, unique, and consistent fingerprint. This allows users to manage dozens or hundreds of accounts across platforms without linking or detection.

What Is OmniLogin?

OmniLogin is a Chromium-based anti-detect browser designed to give users complete control over their digital identity. It enables users to:

  • Create separate browser profiles that mimic real devices
  • Modify browser fingerprints with customizable parameters
  • Assign each profile a different IP via proxy
  • Automate browser actions with no-code tools
  • Share profiles securely with team members

Each profile functions like a completely separate machine, with unique configurations, storage, and session data. Profiles do not share cookies, history, or fingerprints—making it nearly impossible for websites or platforms to detect that they are controlled by the same person or organization.

OmniLogin is purpose-built for power users—marketers, agencies, developers, data miners, and others who rely on undetectable multi-accounting and automation.

Key Features of OmniLogin

1. Isolated Browser Profiles

Each OmniLogin profile runs in a containerized environment that replicates a unique machine. That means:

  • Separate storage for cookies, sessions, local storage
  • Distinct browser fingerprints
  • Dedicated proxy and geolocation
  • Custom headers, language, and time settings
  • Compatibility with mobile or desktop emulation

You can manage profiles individually or in bulk. Export/import settings and quickly duplicate working setups for streamlined scaling.

2. Advanced Fingerprint Spoofing

OmniLogin allows complete control over the following fingerprint elements:

  • Canvas rendering
  • WebGL capabilities and vendor spoofing
  • Audio fingerprinting
  • Fonts and font smoothing
  • Navigator and platform fields
  • Timezone and language spoofing
  • Hardware concurrency
  • Touch support and screen resolution

Unlike basic spoofing tools, OmniLogin mimics realistic configurations that match the proxy and use-case. This prevents detection by anti-fraud systems that can spot inconsistencies between IP, timezone, and system settings.

3. Proxy Integration

Each browser profile can be assigned a different IP address using:

  • HTTP and HTTPS proxies
  • SOCKS5 proxies
  • Mobile proxies
  • ISP proxies
  • Residential rotating proxies

OmniLogin works seamlessly with Ziny Proxy, allowing users to match geolocation with each device profile, rotate IPs on schedule or action-based triggers, and avoid IP bans and CAPTCHAs. Built-in proxy testing and IP leak protection ensure no exposure during sessions. If the proxy test fails during profile setup, the proxy errors troubleshooting guide covers the most common configuration issues with exact fixes.

4. No-Code Automation Tools

OmniLogin includes a powerful automation engine:

  • Drag-and-drop action builder
  • Schedule and repeat tasks such as logins, clicks, and form fills
  • Automate scraping or data collection
  • Trigger workflows across multiple profiles

Human behaviour simulation — pauses, mouse movement, scrolls — reduces bot detection and improves account trust scores. For data collection pipelines specifically, combining OmniLogin’s automation with Ziny’s residential proxies is one of the most effective setups for web scraping without getting blocked.

5. Team Collaboration Features

OmniLogin is built with teams in mind:

  • Invite members with specific role permissions
  • Assign profiles and folders
  • View usage logs and activity history
  • Enable or restrict data sharing between roles

Whether you’re a solo media buyer or a 20-person agency, you can control access and monitor performance from one dashboard.

6. Cloud & Local Storage Options

Store profiles securely in the cloud or locally:

  • Cloud: Access from multiple devices
  • Local: Extra speed and offline usage
  • Export/import: Backup and move profiles easily

Data is encrypted, and access is restricted to account owners or team members with permission.

7. API Access & Developer Tools

For developers and technical users:

  • Launch/close profiles via API
  • Assign proxies or automation scripts
  • Integrate with third-party bots or platforms
  • Pull logs and usage data
  • Connect with Puppeteer, Selenium, Playwright

Great for:

  • SaaS platforms
  • Browser-based scraping
  • Automated user testing

Common Use Cases: Who Should Use OmniLogin?

OmniLogin is versatile enough to serve a wide range of digital professionals. Common use cases include:

Affiliate Marketing

  • Run unlimited ad accounts without bans
  • Cloak affiliate links safely
  • Split-test creatives and funnels
  • Rotate accounts across networks (Facebook, TikTok, Google, Bing)

E-Commerce Store Management

  • Manage multiple Shopify, Etsy, Amazon, or eBay stores
  • Isolate supplier, buyer, and seller accounts
  • Automate listing updates and reviews
  • Avoid cross-linking between store logins

Cryptocurrency & Web3

  • Access multiple wallets and exchanges
  • Farm airdrops without triggering blacklists
  • Simulate devices from different countries
  • Bypass regional KYC restrictions

Lead Generation & Outreach

  • Automate email scraping and outreach
  • Avoid blacklists and spam flags
  • Manage warm-up accounts and campaigns

Data Scraping and Research

  • Scrape without being blocked or rate-limited
  • Rotate user-agents, proxies, and sessions
  • Simulate device types or regional behavior

QA Testing & Development

  • Simulate user flows in different locations
  • Run automated tests in varied browser environments
  • Analyze platform behavior from multiple perspectives

How OmniLogin Compares with Other Anti-Detect Browsers

OmniLogin’s key advantage is its simplicity combined with power—allowing non-technical users to perform sophisticated tasks without needing code or scripts.

Getting Started with OmniLogin (Step-by-Step)

  1. Visit omnilogin.net and sign up.
  2. Download the application for Windows or macOS.
  3. Create your first browser profile.
  4. Assign a fingerprint or let OmniLogin randomize one.
  5. Choose a proxy from your provider (e.g., Ziny Proxy).
  6. Launch the browser and start your session.
  7. Save your progress in the cloud or locally.
  8. Set up automations if needed.
  9. Scale by duplicating successful profiles.
  10. Invite your team and assign access roles.

Real-World Testimonials & Success Stories

  • Elias, Affiliate Marketer: “OmniLogin is a game-changer. I manage over 40 Facebook ad accounts and haven’t had a ban since switching. The automation saves hours every week.”
  • Maria, Shopify Seller: “Before OmniLogin, logging into 6 stores was a nightmare. Now I run them from one dashboard with different proxies. Total lifesaver.”
  • Adeel, Crypto Enthusiast: “I’ve used other anti-detect browsers, but OmniLogin + Ziny Proxy gives me the best speed, success rate, and ease of use.”

Pricing & Refund Policy

  • Free Plan: 2 profiles, full automation tools included
  • Basic Plan: $29/month for 100+ profiles
  • Pro Plan: Custom quote for agencies and large teams
  • Refund Guarantee: 48-hour money-back policy

Compared to competitors charging $99+/month for fewer features, OmniLogin delivers unbeatable value.

Final Verdict: Why OmniLogin Is #1 in 2026

OmniLogin is more than just a browser, it’s a privacy infrastructure built for scale. With real world tested features like fingerprint spoofing, proxy integration, no-code automation, and team collaboration, it empowers users to operate safely in any online environment.

If your success depends on staying undetected, managing multiple accounts, and scaling without restrictions, OmniLogin + Ziny Proxy is the winning combination.

Run accounts. Avoid bans. Scale fast. Stay anonymous.

The post Why OmniLogin Is One of the Best Anti-Detect Privacy Browsers in 2026 appeared first on Ziny.io.
